title: The Case for Investing in Climate-Change Resilience: Insights from Science, Engineering, and Economics
summary: Professor John P. Holdren gave the keynote lecture opening a two-day international congress at the University of Illinois, Urbana-Champaign, which was organized by the University’s Institute for Sustainability, Energy, and Environment on the topic of "Building Resilience to Climate Change."
body: Overview Professor John P. Holdren gave the keynote lecture opening a two-day international congress at the University of Illinois, Urbana-Champaign, which was organized by the University’s Institute for Sustainability, Energy, and Environment on the topic of "Building Resilience to Climate Change." The latest from Belfer See more Recommended citation Holdren, John P. “The Case for Investing in Climate-Change Resilience: Insights from Science, Engineering, and Economics.” Presentation, Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School, September 18, 2017. (presented at University of Illinois at Urbana–Champaign/Building Resilience to Climate Change, Urbana, Illinois).
